n: The Spectre and the Shadow, Part 2

steps.t: Meet with Khaljûn outside the Blade-horn. The Blade-horn can be found south-east of Sormedân.
Enter the interior of the Blade-horn.
Defeat the Tasked Ones and search for books mentioning the Tarsâri within the Blade-horn.
Speak with Khaljûn outside the Blade-horn.
